https://kmc.du.ac.in/kmcouter/collnews/2.title: ACADEMIC AWARDS FOR THE YEAR 2025
https://kmc.du.ac.in/kmcouter/collnews/2.text:
KIRORI MAL COLLEGE, Delhi-110007

Academic Awards for the year 2025

 

The following students have been provisionally selected for Academic and other sponsored awards to be conferred on the Annual Day 2026. The committee decided that the Academic Awards would be given to the students who have stood first in first division, based on overall CGPA, in each course in 3rd year 2024-2025. Please submit your representation, spelling mistake in name, query etc., if any, with related supporting documents to the office of Librarian, Kirori Mal College Library, latest by 14.03.2026.

https://kmc.du.ac.in/kmcouter/collnews/6.title: CLASS TEST SCHEDULE: 9–14 MARCH 2026.
https://kmc.du.ac.in/kmcouter/collnews/6.text:
NOTICE

 

Class Test Schedule (Semester II, IV, VI, VIII): 9–14 March 2026.

 

As already informed earlier, Class Tests for various Courses (Semester II, IV, VI, VIII) will be conducted from 9th March to 14th March 2026.

 

Students are advised to carefully note the dates and timings of their papers as per the schedule shared by the respective departments in this notice.

 

Please note: These class tests will not be conducted again therefore students are advised to take this seriously and ensure their presence accordingly.

 

Best wishes,

 

 

Prof. Dinesh Khattar

Principal

Kirori Mal College

University of Delhi

Delhi - 110007
